events.operator_statement_summary: The operator confirmed completion after being instructed to switch the unit fully off for at least five seconds and boot normally with USB and the CAL-to-RF fixture connected; this fresh all-14 capture began immediately afterward.
The unit was switched fully off for at least five seconds and booted normally before the untouched-official all-14 reference capture, as recorded in the existing RC5 cold-boot attestations.

limitations: Power removal is operator-attested because the serial capture cannot sense supply voltage.

The candidate capture is bound to the exact runtime version, USB identity, checksum inventory, and an earlier exact candidate readback; the self-test runner does not itself perform a new DFU readback.
The historical official reference is exact-version-bound and was not retroactively DFU-readback-bound.
